where.if: AND (src_ip::text ILIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%') OR dest_ip::text ILIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%') OR payload_json::text ILIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, "timestamp", event_type, src_ip::text AS src_ip, src_port, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, dest_port, proto, (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'signature' AS signature FROM ${t}
ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t}
SELECT payload_json::text FROM ${t} WHERE id::text = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('${iv}', "timestamp"::timestamptz), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t}
GROUP BY date_trunc('${iv}', "timestamp"::timestamptz) ORDER BY date_trunc('${iv}', "timestamp"::timestamptz)
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t}
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t} WHERE event_type = 'alert'
SELECT count(DISTINCT src_ip) FROM ${t}
SELECT event_type AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} WHERE event_type = 'alert' AND (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k ORDER BY k
SELECT COALESCE((payload_json::jsonb)->>'app_proto', lower(proto), 'unknown') AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY k ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT src_ip::text AS src_ip, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY src_ip, dest_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT src_ip::text AS src_ip, NULL::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY src_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT NULL::text AS src_ip, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY dest_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t} WHERE (src_ip::text = #{ip} OR dest_ip::text = #{ip})
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t} WHERE src_ip::text = #{ip}
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t} WHERE dest_ip::text = #{ip}

SELECT (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} WHERE event_type='alert' AND (src_ip::text = #{ip} OR dest_ip::text = #{ip}) AND (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k ORDER BY k

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('hour', "timestamp"::timestamptz), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} WHERE (src_ip::text = #{ip} OR dest_ip::text = #{ip}) GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', "timestamp"::timestamptz) ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', "timestamp"::timestamptz)
SELECT count(*) FROM ${t} WHERE event_type='alert' AND (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'signature' = #{sig}
